channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iran Army Responds to Trump’s Threats, Says Forces Remain Determined
item.description: Iran’s army don talk say the words wey U.S. President Donald Trump yarn no go fit shake their soldiers’ spirit or stop their military movement. Trump, during one speech for Washington, brag say Americ...

item.title: Woman gives birth on Caribbean Airlines flight approaching JFK Airport
item.description: A woman travelling aboard Caribbean Airlines Flight 005 from Kingston, Jamaica, to New York City gave birth as the plane was making its final approach to John F. Kennedy International Airport. Accordi...

item.title: Lagos Fanti Carnival Celebrates Afro-Brazilian Heritage with Colour and Music
item.description: Ahahn! The Lagos Fanti Carnival, also known as the Fanti Festival, just shook Lagos Island! It was a serious display of colours, music and cultural heritage on Easter Monday. Top people, including Gov...

item.title: Cebu Pacific launches ₱88 seat sale to commemorate Araw ng Kagitingan
item.description: In celebration of Araw ng Kagitingan, Cebu Pacific announced a special seat sale offering domestic flights for as low as ₱88. The promotion aims to encourage Filipinos to travel around the country whi...

item.title: Nigeria Army Takes Action Against Terrorists and Kidnappers in Plateau
item.description: The Nigerian Army has made significant strides in tackling security threats in Plateau State. In operations carried out on April 4 and 5, soldiers killed two suspected terrorists during a firefight al...

item.title: NBI cautions public on scam groups posing as officials to solicit donations
item.description: The National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) has issued a public warning about criminal syndicates impersonating government officials and well-known personalities to solicit donations for fake non-gover...

item.title: AI Study Identifies Gut Biomarkers for Early Detection of Gastrointestinal Diseases
item.description: Researchers at the University of Birmingham have identified a set of gut microbiome and metabolome markers that could improve early detection of gastrointestinal diseases such as gastric cancer, color...

item.title: Rare Softshell Turtle Found at High Altitude in Bageshwar, Forest Department Plans Survey
item.description: In an unusual event, a softshell turtle has been sighted at an altitude of approximately 2,950 feet in Bageshwar district. The turtle was found in a seasonal stream by Mohan Chandra Joshi, a local res...

item.title: Waitrose under fire for dismissing worker who stopped shoplifter at Clapham Junction store
item.description: Waitrose is facing a significant backlash after dismissing a long-standing employee, Walker Smith, for intervening when a thief attempted to steal Easter eggs at their Clapham Junction branch in Londo...

item.title: A Practical Guide to Beginning Your Home Buying Journey
item.description: Buying a house is a major life and financial milestone that requires careful planning and informed decision-making. The process begins with understanding your financial situation—knowing your budget, ...

item.title: Government explains reasons behind petroleum price hike amid opposition backlash
item.description: In a heated National Assembly session in Islamabad, the opposition harshly criticised the government for sharply increasing petroleum prices, while ministers defended the decision, citing global oil m...

item.title: Delhi High Court rules Kejriwal’s rent assurance lacks legal binding force
item.description: The Delhi High Court has overturned a 2021 directive that had previously upheld Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal’s assurance to pay rent for the residence occupied by him at Civil Lines. The ruling clar...

item.title: Canberra's Illegal Tobacco Market Operates Openly in Licensed Stores
item.description: An investigation across Canberra's licensed tobacconists and gift shops revealed that illegal cigarettes are being sold openly, despite the products being unlawful. The reporter, posing as a regular c...

item.title: Omar Abdullah urges transparency in Ganderbal encounter inquiry
item.description: Jammu & Kashmir Chief Minister Omar Abdullah on April 6, 2026, emphasised the need for transparency regarding the magisterial inquiry into the Ganderbal encounter, in which one local individual lost h...

item.title: Six-Vehicle Collision in Calgary Hospitalizes Three Children, Two Adults Seriously Injured
item.description: A serious traffic collision involving six vehicles in northwest Calgary has resulted in the hospitalization of three children and two adults. The incident occurred and emergency services responded swi...

item.title: Calgary Hit by Snowstorm, Resulting in Numerous Vehicle Accidents
item.description: Calgary experienced a disruptive spring snowstorm over the Easter weekend, leading to numerous vehicle crashes and challenging road conditions. The storm, characteristic of Alberta’s often unpredictab...

item.title: Tori Spelling and Seven Children Treated After Temecula Car Crash
item.description: Tori Spelling, the 52-year-old star of 'Beverly Hills, 90210,' was involved in a car accident in Temecula, California, while driving with seven children, including her four own children and three of t...

item.title: Electronic Artists Collaborate on Album to Support Endangered Bird Conservation
item.description: A new music project called Shika Shika is turning environmental awareness into sound. Founded by Robin Perkins, a UK-born musician and environmental campaigner known as El Búho, the initiative blends ...

item.title: Canada’s Growing Dependence on China: A Dangerous Shift in Foreign Policy
item.description: In a recent article, John Ivison criticizes Canada's increasing political and economic ties with China under the current Liberal government. While Canada’s Finance Minister, François-Philippe Champagn...

item.title: Jason Day Offers Sympathy for Tiger Woods Amid DUI Controversy
item.description: Australian golfer Jason Day has expressed both sympathy and confusion over Tiger Woods' recent decision to drive under the influence, an action that led to Woods being charged with a DUI after a car a...
